acceptance.assertion: Scout output is change-only rather than a noisy full report.
Scout change-only output covers PR drift, stale reviews, runtime/main drift, unpushed branches, and missing receipts.
Scout does not mutate repositories or runtime state.

goal: Implement a durable Scout that reports only changes such as PR drift, stale reviews, runtime/main drift, unpushed branches, and missing receipts.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.
metadata.verification_note: Grabowski PR #94 merged; CI validate 3.10/3.12 passed; local python3 -m pytest and make validate passed before merge.
metadata.outcome: Added a read-only scout grip that reports only change items for PR drift, stale reviews, runtime/main drift, unpushed branches and missing expected receipt paths; includes disabled switch and no-mutation checks.

validated_acceptance.only-changes: Scout output contains enabled, change_count, changes and non_claims; it omits a full situation dump.
validated_acceptance.pr-and-runtime-drift: Tests cover runtime/main drift, unpushed branch, PR drift, stale review state and missing expected receipt path categories.
validated_acceptance.disable-switch: disabled=true returns no changes and performs no git or gh observation in focused tests.
validated_acceptance.no-mutation: Scout is READ_ONLY, available to observer profile, and tests assert no mutating git verbs are used.

title: Add durable scout prototype
